note: Hand-curated 2026 offseason narrative — to be replaced by Cloudflare intel-scraper Worker output. Each item is publishable as a tweet draft.

ARI.headline: Cardinals went 3-14 and basically ignored their defense in free agency. Ossenfort on the hot seat.
Isaac Seumalo signing fortifies the interior O-line, but it's a band-aid on a bigger problem.
Kyler Murray's future in Arizona feels conditional on this draft going right.

ATL.headline: Falcons land Tua Tagovailoa from Miami — a real franchise QB answer for $1.3M (MIA eats the dead cap).
Jahan Dotson signing has WR room shrugging — needs over and above stick to be a real WR2.
Bijan Robinson contract talks heating up — ATL knows they have to pay him.

BAL.headline: Trey Hendrickson signing electrified Baltimore after Maxx Crosby trade fell through.
Tyler Linderbaum departure for LV stings — interior O-line now a need.
Lamar Jackson camp reportedly wants a CB1 in this draft — secondary remains the soft spot.

BUF.headline: Bills land DJ Moore from Chicago — Allen finally has a true WR1.
Bradley Chubb signing addresses the pass rush after Joey Bosa departure.
Sean McDermott out, Joe Brady promoted — coaching transition adds variance to a contender.
New Highmark Stadium opens this season. The team has to live up to it.

CAR.headline: Panthers went 8-9 and quietly might be the most improved team in the NFC South.
Bryce Young's Year 3 leap is the entire 2026 season for Carolina.

CHI.headline: Caleb Williams went 11-6 in Year 2, won a playoff game. Bears finally have a QB.
DJ Moore traded to Buffalo — opens a target share for the new WR2 to grow into.
Kalif Raymond and Garrett Bradbury signings get a B-grade from PFF — measured offseason.
Braxton Jones contract situation lingering — LT future a Day 2 draft priority.

CIN.headline: Bengals attacked the defense after a 6-11 disaster: Bryan Cook, Boye Mafe, Jonathan Allen all in.
Joe Burrow healthy and the championship window is wide open again.
Pass rush remains the swing factor — Mafe needs to be a real EDGE1.

CLE.headline: Browns finished 5-12 and offseason was almost entirely O-line focused.
Deshaun Watson contract continues to be the league's biggest cap albatross.
Myles Garrett trade rumors swirling but Cleveland keeps insisting he's not available.

DAL.headline: Cowboys finally opened the cap toolbox after years of dormancy — defensive upgrades headline FA.
Rashan Gary trade lands a real EDGE1 — biggest defensive splash in years.
Otito Ogbonnia signing is the kind of value play Dallas hasn't made under Jerry.

DEN.headline: Broncos went 14-3 behind Bo Nix's breakout — Sean Payton vindicated.
Jaylen Waddle trade from Miami gives Nix another weapon — WR room stacked.
Run-it-back philosophy in FA — quiet but confident offseason.

DET.headline: Lions lost Anzalone, Decker, Montgomery in FA. NFC title window cracking?
Cade Mays signing is fine but doesn't replace what walked out the door.
Edge rusher void after Hutchinson injury history — Day 1 draft priority.

GB.headline: Packers finished anticlimactic offseason after Jordan Love's rough year.
Rashan Gary trade to Dallas was the only major splash — and it was a trade out.
Offensive line locked up long-term — at least the foundation is set.

HOU.headline: Texans target O-line: Braden Smith and Ed Ingram both signed to protect Stroud.
Reed Blankenship signing fortifies an already elite defense.
DeMeco Ryans has a clear plan — Houston is built to last.

IND.headline: Daniel Jones re-signed for $88M — Colts doubling down on a polarizing QB call.
Alec Pierce extended at $116M — surprise commitment to a developing receiver.
Lost Kwity Paye, Nick Cross, Zaire Franklin — defense gutted in FA.

JAX.headline: Jaguars went 13-4 with Lawrence's breakout — but Etienne and Devin Lloyd both left in FA.
Travis Hunter cemented as franchise cornerstone — two-way usage continuing.
Window-closing fears mounting despite quietest offseason of any 13-win team.

KC.headline: Mahomes torn ACL in Week 8 derailed the dynasty. KC went 6-11.
Kenneth Walker III signed to anchor the run game while Mahomes rehabs.
Justin Fields acquired from NYJ for a 6th-round pick to bridge at QB.
Travis Kelce re-signed for one more run — sentimental but strategic.

LAC.headline: Odafe Oweh leaving for Washington stings — pass rush takes a hit.
Charlie Kolar quiet TE signing could be a sneaky-good value move.
Herbert protection still the unresolved question — interior O-line untouched.

LAR.headline: Rams spent over $200M on the secondary — Trent McDuffie trade headlines the rebuild.
Jaylen Watson signing pairs with McDuffie — instant elite CB room.
Stafford healthy, Kupp back, secondary loaded — championship window cracked open.

LV.headline: Raiders led the league in spending at $281M+ — completely different roster.
Tyler Linderbaum from Baltimore is the kind of center signing that changes a franchise.
Nakobe Dean and Quay Walker tap into the Georgia connection — defense reloaded.
Going 3-14 hurts. Going 3-14 with this offseason cap commitment is a different kind of pressure.

MIA.headline: Dolphins traded Tua to Atlanta — Miami eats the dead cap, ATL pays $1.3M.
Jaylen Waddle shipped to Denver — full teardown signal after a 7-10 season.
Malik Willis signed as the bridge QB — clearly tanking for the 2027 QB class.
Tyreek Hill's future the next domino — almost certainly available at the right price.

MIN.headline: Vikings entered the offseason without a permanent GM — conservative approach.
Derek Murray QB competition signals McCarthy may be coaching for his job.
Cap-constrained and quiet — supplementing rather than rebuilding.

NE.headline: Drake Maye's 14-3 Cinderella run took the Patriots to Super Bowl LX. Foxborough believing again.
Romeo Doubs signing gives Maye a real WR2 — running it back with weapons.
Kevin Byard veteran safety addition — defensive leadership for a young roster.

NO.headline: Saints finally out of cap hell — first real spending in years.
Travis Etienne signing from Jacksonville is the splash move of NO's offseason.
Kaden Elliss returning fortifies LB room — David Edwards adds interior O-line muscle.
QB plan still unclear — biggest unresolved question of this draft.

NYG.headline: Giants finished 4-13 — full QB reset incoming via the draft.
Schoen and Daboll on the hottest seats in football. Draft has to land.

NYJ.headline: Jets went 3-14 and brought back Geno Smith after SEA dumped him post-Super Bowl.
Justin Fields traded to Kansas City for a 6th-round pick — fans furious.
Minkah Fitzpatrick acquired — defense improving, but offense feels like nobody's plan.
Aaron Glenn's seat is hot. Without Saleh's defensive design, the rebuild stalls.

PHI.headline: Eagles roster has all the talent to compete for another Super Bowl.
Adoree Jackson retention quietly important — secondary stays elite.
Reed Blankenship departure to Houston creates the only real depth concern (safety).

PIT.headline: Steelers electrified by Michael Pittman Jr. trade and Rico Dowdle signing.
Mike McCarthy era off to an aggressive start — Omar Khan delivering.
QB room still the unresolved variable — Wilson legacy decisions looming.

SEA.headline: Seahawks won Super Bowl LX, beating New England 31-24. Jaxon Smith-Njigba SB MVP.
Dumped Geno Smith despite the title — letting the championship QB walk to NYJ.
Rashid Shaheed retention keeps the WR room intact — running it back.
Kenneth Walker departure to KC clears a path for the run game refresh.

SF.headline: Mike Evans signed at age 33 — 49ers gambling on short-term WR fix.
Trent Williams contract standoff continues to cloud the offseason.
Brock Purdy contract talks heating up — pay him or move on?

TB.headline: Mike Evans departure for SF ends an era in Tampa.
Alex Anzalone signing brings elite coverage LB — Bowles' defense gets a missing piece.
Cade Otton retention preserves the only reliable target alongside Godwin.
Edge rusher remains the biggest hole — draft Day 1 priority.

TEN.headline: Robert Saleh's hire and $270M+ FA spree is the offseason story of 2026.
11 of 14 signings have direct ties to Saleh's coaching tree — schematic familiarity unprecedented.
Wandale Robinson and John Franklin-Myers headline a stunning roster makeover.
Cam Ward's rookie year now has scheme support most rookie QBs never get.

WAS.headline: Adam Peters orchestrating a complete defensive overhaul under Vic Fangio.
Seven defensive signings in two weeks — Flores scheme imported wholesale.
Jayden Daniels' Year 3 with a real defense behind him — NFC East could shift.
